mapper.select:
SELECT STATUS.eduId, STATUS.eduTitle, STATUS.progress, STATUS.studyTime, STATUS.recentStudyAt, STATUS.learningType FROM ( SELECT TE.ID AS eduId, TE.EDU_TITLE AS eduTitle, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) / COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) * 100 ) END AS progress, NVL( ROUND( ( CAST(NVL(MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT), SYSDATE) AS DATE) - CAST(TES.EDU_START_AT AS DATE) ) * 24 * 60 * 60 ), 0 ) AS studyTime, CAST(MAX(NVL(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT, TES.EDU_START_AT)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS recentStudyAt, 'LEARN' AS learningType FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID AND AND TWS.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID AND TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT >= TES.EDU_START_AT WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 AND TES.EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 0 AND TES.ID = ( SELECT MAX(TES2.ID) FROM TBL_EDU_START TES2 WHERE TES2.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID AND TES2.EDU_ID = TES.EDU_ID AND TES2.EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 0 ) GROUP BY TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE, TES.EDU_START_AT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) < COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID)
UNION ALL
SELECT TQ.ID AS eduId, TQ.QUIZ_TITLE AS eduTitle, 0 AS progress, ROUND((CAST(SYSDATE AS DATE) - CAST(TQS.QUIZ_START_AT AS DATE)) * 24 * 60 * 60) AS studyTime, CAST(TQS.QUIZ_START_AT AS TIMESTAMP) AS recentStudyAt, 'QUIZ' AS learningType FROM TBL_QUIZ_START TQS JOIN TBL_QUIZ TQ ON TQS.QUIZ_ID = TQ.ID WHERE TQS.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT TQA WHERE TQA.USER_ID = TQS.USER_ID AND TQA.QUIZ_ID = TQS.QUIZ_ID AND TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_CREATE_AT > TQS.QUIZ_START_AT ) ) STATUS ORDER BY STATUS.recentStudyAt DESC, STATUS.eduId ASC

SELECT RESULT.quizAttemptId, RESULT.quizId, RESULT.quizTitle, RESULT.correctCount, RESULT.totalCount, RESULT.spentTime, RESULT.accuracy, RESULT.quizAttemptCreateAt, RESULT.resultType, RESULT.resultPath FROM ( SELECT TES.ID AS quizAttemptId, TE.ID AS quizId, TE.EDU_TITLE AS quizTitle, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) AS correctCount, 5 AS totalCount, NVL( ROUND( ( CAST(MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT) AS DATE) - CAST(TES.EDU_START_AT AS DATE) ) * 24 * 60 * 60 ), 0 ) AS spentTime, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) > 5 THEN 100 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) / 5 * 100) END AS accuracy, CAST(MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT) AS TIMESTAMP) AS quizAttemptCreateAt, 'LEARN' AS resultType, '/study/learn' AS resultPath FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 AND TES.EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 1 GROUP BY TES.ID, TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE, TES.EDU_START_AT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT TQA.ID AS quizAttemptId, TQ.ID AS quizId, TQ.QUIZ_TITLE AS quizTitle, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE AS correctCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TIME AS spentTime, CASE WHEN TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE / TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT * 100) END AS accuracy, CAST(TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_CREATE_AT AS TIMESTAMP) AS quizAttemptCreateAt, 'QUIZ' AS resultType, CASE TQ.ID WHEN 1 THEN '/study/chapter/sign-history/result' WHEN 2 THEN '/study/chapter/sos/result' WHEN 3 THEN '/study/chapter/morse/result' ELSE '/study/chapter' END AS resultPath FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT TQA JOIN TBL_QUIZ TQ ON TQA.QUIZ_ID = TQ.ID WHERE TQA.USER_ID = #{userId} ) RESULT ORDER BY RESULT.quizAttemptCreateAt DESC, RESULT.quizAttemptId DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.totalCount) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.correctCount) / SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.totalCount) * 100 ) END AS totalAccuracy, NVL(SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.correctCount), 0) AS totalQuestionCount, NVL(SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.spentTime), 0) AS totalStudyTime FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) AS correctCount, 5 AS totalCount, NVL( ROUND( ( CAST(NVL(MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT), SYSDATE) AS DATE) - CAST(TES.EDU_START_AT AS DATE) ) * 24 * 60 * 60 ), 0 ) AS spentTime FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 AND TES.EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 1 GROUP BY TES.ID, TES.EDU_ID, TES.EDU_START_AT
UNION ALL
SELECT TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE AS correctCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TIME AS spentTime FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT TQA WHERE TQA.USER_ID = #{userId} ) SUMMARY_DATA
